name: circular-economy-evaluator
description: RAG-powered evaluator for circular economy business evaluations
author: Areeb Ahmed Zahoori <zahooriareeb47@gmail.com>

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c "yellow,cyan" "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspaces --if-present && npx rimraf node_modules package-lock.json && npm cache clean --force && npm install
